## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (unit + integration)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Docs / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if needed
